purpose: Determine whether a ReT-aligned, deployable MPC leaves residual observable headroom that a learned belief and terminal value could convert. T0 cannot establish Paper 2.

historical_claims.program_q_floor: A frozen RecurrentPPO replicated superiority over the complete open-loop frontier but failed the worst-product compound gate and did not show a neural premium.

t0_questions: Does a ReT-aligned MPC with horizons 1, 3, 4, 6 and 8 absorb the apparent residual headroom?
Does history contain deployable information beyond the nominal analytic belief?
Can a learned continuation value improve quality or latency without worsening worst-product service?
Can a confidence gate fall back reliably outside calibration support or under solver failure?

nested_arms.M0: strong ReT-aligned nominal/particle/scenario MPC with explicit service constraints
nested_arms.M3: M0 plus recurrent belief correction and learned terminal value
nested_arms.M4: M3 behind a calibrated confidence-and-support gate

architecture_freeze.reason: Architecture is selected only after residual headroom and calibration feasibility are demonstrated on burned data.

compute_fairness.rule: Report a preregistered quality-time-safety frontier first. Freeze an operational online SLA prospectively; do not derive it by rounding a favorable observed runtime.

requirements: exact belief-DP dominates or ties every tested policy

required: LCB95 residual value versus strongest deployable MPC at least 0.015
LCB95 value versus complete open-loop frontier at least 0.015
real history beats shuffled and delayed history
resources, demand and mass are exact
at least two actions are materially optimal
the result is stable over a connected plausible region

stop_rules: full-horizon or strengthened deployable MPC absorbs the residual gap
history does not beat its placebos
the confidence gate is miscalibrated or selectively abstains on hard cases
worst-product service or lost demand fails
the apparent gain uses extra physical resources or privileged information

publication_routes.secondary: quality-time-safety frontier if equivalence and a material operational advantage are prospectively confirmed
publication_routes.base: Program Q boundary result; no Program T promotion

paper3_dependency: No Paper 3 scientific seed may open until a prospectively frozen Paper 2 contract passes. T0 may only define component-level retained/reset tests.
